---
title: "Charles William Vanustegen Stewart"
---

## Charles William Vanustegen Stewart

**Dates:** (1859-1943)

### Description

solicitor, brother-in-law of Mary Anderson Morshead

### Biography

He married (25 April 1884) CMY\'s cousin Mildred Anderson Morshead.

### Letters

- Letter from March 28th [1884] 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
